titleStmt.title: SII 23.123: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 123. (A.R. No. 123 of 1907.) Āḷvārkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Vaṉṉiyappar temple—on a stone set up at the entrance into the west gōpura, right side

summary.p: This is dated in Śaka 1534, Kollam 788, Paridhāvi Aṟpaśi, ba. 2, Aśvati (A.D. 1612, October 1). It registers an agreement similar to that mentioned Nāṭṭavar of Āḷvārkuṟichchi, Puttūr, Ānbūr and Kaḍaiyam making over as sarvamānya, a gift of what is called the poṟuppu (responsibility or supervision ?) of the income on all the lands in their māgaṇai, for the expenses of the festival in the temple, for the merit of the same chief and officer.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu vannitppan
svastiśrī . śakābdam 10 5[3 10 4]
yitaṉmel cellāniṉṟa
kollam 7 100 8 10 8 varuṣam paritā
vi varuṣam teṭcaṇāyaṉattu carattu
rituvil Aṟpaci mātam 12 Aparapaṭcattu tu
tikaiyum kuruvaccirayokamum
kecakaraṇamum peṟṟa Acupatina
ṭcattirattu nāḷ poṟuppukku ca
ṟuvamāṉiyamākap paṇṇikkuṭut
ta tāṉappiṟamāṇamāvatu muḷḷinā
ṭṭu vaṭamelpiṭākai Āḻvār
kuṟicci puttūr vāttāṟṟu vaṉ
ṉitirttakkaraiyil Eḻunta
ruḷiyirukkum nayiṉār tiruvaṉ
ṉicuramuṭaiya tampirāṉārk
ku melppaṭināṭṭu Āḷvārkuṟic
ci puttūr cā viya kaṭṭiṉāpuram Ā
ṉpūr coṇāṭu kaṭaiyam Uḷpaṭṭa
nāṭṭavarom tiruvaṉṉicuramuṭaiya nayiṉār tampirāṉā
ṟku tiruviḷā naṭakkumpaṭikku ciṟi
matu vicuvaṉātanāyakkar muttu
virappanāyakkarayyaṉ Avarka
ḷukku puṇṇiyamākavum murtti
ceṭṭiyār cevvanticeṭṭiyār Ayyaṉ A
varkaḷukku puṇṇiyamākavum ciṉṉāt
tai mutaliyār Avarkaḷukku puṇṇiyamākavum
maṇiyam nārāyaṇatevamutaliyār
Avarkaḷukkum Attān tarma paravi
mā ṉāpiḷḷaiyavarkaḷukku puṇ
ṇiyamākavum Attān tarmattai
kkūṭṭuk kaṇakkappiḷḷaimārk
kup puṇṇiyamāka Eṅkaḷ māka
ṇaiyil Uḷḷa nilaṅkaḷukkum puñcai
puṉaikkuḷam veṭṭuttiruttu māva
ṭai maravaṭai Ārāmam Ivai mu
talāṉa caṟuvappiṟārttikaḷukkum
poṟuppu caṟuvamāṉiyap piṟamāṇa
m paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ituve ca
ṟuvamāṉiyamākac cempilum cilaiyi
lum veṭṭi cantirātittavarai ti
ruviḻā naṭattikkoṇṭu varuvārkaḷā
kavum Inta puṇṇiyattai pari
pālaṉam paṇṇi naṭatti varukiṟavar
kaḷ keṅkaikaraiyile Acuvame
tayākam paṇṇiṉa palattaiyum
civapiṟatiṭṭai paṇṇiṉa palattai
yum civacāyucciyamum peṟakkaṭavā
rākavum Inta puṇṇiyattukku
Akutam paṇṇukiṟavarkaḷ keṅkai
kkaraiyile kārāmpacuvaik
koṉṟa toḻattilum piramma
[ha]ttiyavatai paṇṇiṉa toḻattilu
m taṉ mātāpitāvaik koṉṟa to
ḻcattilum kuruvaik koṉṟa toḻcat
tilum pokakkaṭavārākavum . tāṉapā
laṉayor macce tāṉārcceyoṉupā
laṉam tāṉārc corkkam mavārppa
ṉoti pālaṉāt Accutam patam . sudattam
paradattam vā yo hareti vasu
ndharām ṣaṣṭirparṣa sahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyām jāyate kṛmiḥ . vaṉṉiyappa
r cipātame tuṇai
Digital edition of SII 23.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
